headline.text: L3 ML4 startup pushed through *2 depositor issues* and completed temper flushes overnight — TG3 belt damage and TG4 ATP failure remain for Tuesday.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel lines through the shift with a ten-minute caramel buildup clean on S2 at 15:55 and film tearing resolved by 16:05. Vitamin E shortage limited one-shot production to 9,320 lbs instead of plan. S'mores pouches arrived and staged at 01:23.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 cleared a mold jam in 15 minutes at 18:27 and ran well otherwise. High-pressure clamps were replaced on ML3 after a walk with maintenance; more clamps ordered for ML2 and depositors. A temperature gauge fell off the curtain on ML3 and needs re-mounting.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 startup cleared a caddy adapter hunt, a depositor #3 communication fault (L2 maintenance assist), and completed temper unit oil flushes by 21:30. PTL3 pump was fixed at 03:10 by adjusting the minimum level setting. TG3 belt is damaged and TG4 failed ATP — both flagged for first shift Tuesday.

notes.text: S2 operator trained on new TW machine, scheduled to come in early when 2nd shift runs next week.
Dave Ruff requested to order more high-pressure clamps for ML2 and depositor areas after ML3 clamp replacement.
Videojet confirmed 1 unit ships today for Tuesday install; 2 remaining units ship next week for truffle line install Friday.

resolved.title: S'mores pouches late delivery
resolved.summary: 16 pallets of S'mores pouches (256k total) scheduled to arrive around 12:30 am for staging.
resolved.resolution: Pouches arrived and staged in warehouse at 01:23 — "The pouches for s'mores have arrived and staged" (Ricardo Tovar).

resolved.title: Mold jam in ML2 demolder
resolved.summary: Mold jammed in demolder at 18:27, line down waiting for maintenance clear.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance cleared jam at 18:42 — "Maintenance cleared the jam. We are running again" (Mathew Draper). Fifteen-minute downtime.

resolved.title: ML3 high-pressure clamps over product
resolved.summary: Two bottom clamps directly over product needed replacement due to risk; maintenance walked through replacement process.
resolved.resolution: New clamps installed by 13:55 — "New clamps are on" (Raymond Fleming). Dave Ruff requested to order more for ML2 and depositors.

resolved.title: Caramel buildup on ML2 forming plates
resolved.summary: Caramel buildup forced line down at 15:55 for plate cleaning.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned and running again at 16:05 — "Line is running again" (Mathew Draper). Ten-minute clean.

resolved.title: ML2 film tearing on startup
resolved.summary: Film tearing when trying to start up after forming plate clean at 16:00.
resolved.resolution: Line running again at 16:05 — "Line is running again" (Mathew Draper). Five-minute resolution.

resolved.title: Depositor #3 won't slide out, communication error
resolved.summary: Depositor #3 wouldn't move into automatic mode for cleaning; door sensors faulting after multiple troubleshooting attempts.
resolved.resolution: L2 maintenance (Raymond Fleming and Efrain Rodriguez) replaced all safety covers, adjusted heating cabinet door safety, power cycled main disconnect, and cleared faults at 21:27 — "were able to get it going" (Preston Elmer).

resolved.title: PTL3 pump not turning on
resolved.summary: PTL3 pump wouldn't start during ML4 startup; maintenance troubleshooting through early morning.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 03:10 by changing minimum level setting from 10% to 0% — "After changing it to 0% minimum it started up" (Kavin Ayala).

resolved.title: Caddy adapter missing for temper unit 1 flush
resolved.summary: Hose and adapters for larger DIN size were missing; adapter located in L2 and retrieved by 13:14, flush started at 13:22.
resolved.resolution: Adapter retrieved from L2 at 13:14 — "The team has the adapter for the caddy" (Rich Brierley). Flush started at 13:22.

resolved.title: Temper unit 1 oil flush taking multiple cycles
resolved.summary: Oil still dirty after third flush at 18:46; needed additional flushes to clear system before chocolate push.
resolved.resolution: Oil flush completed at 21:30 — "Oil flush on temper unit 1 has being completed" (Erandy Garcilazo Ceja). Chocolate push approved by QA at 23:24.

needs_attention.title: Vitamin E shortage limited one-shot production
needs_attention.summary: Ran out of vitamin E during one-shot batch runs; only completed 19 barrels and one partial (9,320 lbs) instead of planned volume.
needs_attention.status: Shortage identified at 22:08, corrected count to 9,320 lbs at 23:02. Sunny Jagtiani asked if running more next week due to inaccurate MRP data; no response by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML3 temperature gauge fell off curtain
needs_attention.summary: Temperature gauge fell off the curtain and was found on the floor; placed on cart for re-installation.
needs_attention.status: Gauge placed on cart at 20:07, needs to be re-mounted on ML3 curtain.

needs_attention.title: TG3 belt damaged
needs_attention.summary: Belt on TG3 discovered damaged during startup inspection at 01:29.
needs_attention.status: Damaged belt flagged at 01:29, no repair or replacement mentioned by window close. Escalated to Jose Vasquez and Kavin Ayala for Tuesday first shift.

needs_attention.title: TG4 failed ATP
needs_attention.summary: TG4 belt section failed ATP during ML4 startup final checks.
needs_attention.status: Failed ATP at 07:56, flagged for first shift to address Tuesday. Cooling cabinet 3 and floors also need completion.
